d: It is a heart-touching Bhojpuri film that beautifully portrays the struggle for a home with powerful performances and meaningful storytelling.

After Karthik and Divya marry and have a daughter, Divya learns that both her husband and child have died in a road accident. Suspecting it was murder, she begins her own investigation. She is joined by a journalist, Priya, and together they unravel a conspiracy to find the real culprits behind the deaths.
Welcome to the Red Lorry Film Festival, where cinematic excellence meets artistic expression.
Ardhnaari 2 is a Bhojpuri movie starring Awdhesh Mishra and Sanjukta Roy in prominent roles. It is directed by Raj Kishore Prasad.

The story follows a man drawn into a world of crime and conflict, where he must confront powerful forces and personal challenges. As tensions rise, his journey unfolds through revenge, survival, and a fight against injustice.

The powerful four estates Legislature, Executive, Judiciary and media. Some People working in these systems misuse their powers for their personal fulfilment. Bringing out the Naked in the Dark of Such people by a Dare and Dashing lady Lucky.
A true leader rises not for power, but for the people.
Man of Steel: Sardar is a biopic based on the life of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, the legendary Freedom Fighter known as the "Iron Man of India."

Dadasaheb, a kind-hearted villager, arranges the marriage of his disrespectful son Avinash to Gauri. On the wedding day, a letter revealing Gauri's facial scars changes everything, leading her to reject Avinash and instead choose to marry Namya, a physically challenged man.
Damned Graveyard is a Hindi Horror film, directed by Sanjeev Kumar Rajput.

Munna, a college student is bothered by the nuisance of the underworld and wishes to do something about it.  Munna has a personal tiff with the underworld don, Khakha. Later it turns out that Khakha is Munna`s biloogical father, but Munna takes his stand and fights against him.

A passionate MGR devotee raises his grandson as the actor's reincarnation, but as the boy grows up with beliefs of his own, their clashing values spark an emotional battle between legacy and individuality.
Tang Shiteng Por is a Khasi movie starring Lansius Syiemlieh and Zarina Marbaniang in prominent roles.

Arun returns home only to confront long-buried secrets, unresolved conflicts, and personal demons that threaten to shatter the life he's built. As the past resurfaces, it pulls him into a dark web of truth, guilt, and revelation.

Gopikrishna and Azhagu have big plans to turn an old, rundown bus into a mobile canteen. But their project hits a snag when they discover it`s already occupied by a sneaky mouse and a young girl who have made the bus their home. The two men must now figure out how to deal with their unexpected residents before they can start their dream business.
Sir Vanthara is a Tamil movie starring Ravi Teja, Kajal Agarwal, Naara Rohith and Richa Gangopadhyay in prominent roles. It is directed by Parasuram.
A true leader rises not for power, but for the people.
A true leader rises not for power, but for the people.

A devoted nurse and mothers peaceful life is shattered when she is falsely implicated in a major incident and abandoned by society. Forced into isolation, she begins helping struggling families, turning her pain into purpose. As her influence grows, she faces resistance but rises again, eventually becoming a powerful voice for the people.

Raja, a delivery boy with big ambitions, is caught in a national scam investigation. As he tries to prove his innocence, flashbacks reveal his everyday life and his romance, unravelling secrets that could change everything.

Vinnaithaandi Varuvaayaa 2 is the sequel of the 2010 Tamil movie, Vinnaithaandi Varuvaayaa.

The movie stars R. Madhavan, Tovino Thomas, Puneeth Rajkumar, Anushka Shetty and Tamannaah. It is a drama directed by Gautham Menon.

In this horror comedy packed with scares and surprises, Jaggi- Punjab`s legendary ghosthunter-returns with his ghost buddy Pinky to take on a chilling haunted UK castle. As the spirit defies all his rules and a dark secret comes to light, Jaggi faces his toughest challenge yet. Will he discover the truth before it`s too late?

A satirical comedy following three generations of men, a grandfather obsessed with women, a son bound by a promise, and a future grandson who wants nothing to do with them. Narrated by a robot from 2052, the story takes a chaotic turn when the heros alter ego, his most honest organ, begins guiding him through love, lust, consent, and emotional maturity.
A widower travels to London in search of a single picture of his late wife, and through unexpected challenges, he rebuilds the broken bond with his estranged son.
Ishq Traffic is a vibrant musical journey that blends the rush of romance with the chaos of life, delivering a high-energy experience powered by compelling music and striking visuals.

Set in the 17th century, Kaaliyan tells the story of Kunjirakottu Kaali - a great warrior and forgotten hero who was the close confidant of Venad kingdom's commander-in-chief Iravikkutti Pillai. Inspired by the ballads of Kerala, the epic historical drama recounts how a man of high valour and virtue upheld the pride and prestige of an entire kingdom with his remarkable feats.
Set in the 12th century, it is a period action drama that dramatizes the ancient folklore of a tribal boy from coastal Karnataka and Kerala who is destined for divine status.
Sabash Naidu is a comedy entertainer where Kamal Haasan is reviving the character Balram Naidu from his earlier movie Dasavatharam.

"Hailesso" is a rural action drama film written & Directed by Kumar Kota and produced by Siva Cherry and Ravi Kiran Jagupilla. The film stars Sudheer Anand Bayana, Natasha Singh, Naksha Saran,  Akshara Gowda, Sivaji and others.
Seyon is a Tamil movie starring Sivakarthikeyan in a prominent role. It is directed by Sivakumar Murugesan.
A young woman embarks on a journey to London, hoping to reunite with her estranged lover, but as betrayal and difficult choices unfold, she discovers an unexpected connection that changes everything.

Swapna dreams of becoming a doctor, supported by her sister who works as a call girl to secure her future. Their world shatters when Swapna is raped and dies in her sisters arms. Devastated and enraged, she teams up with four other call girls to hunt down the culprits, leading to a gripping journey of vengeance, sacrifice, and unbreakable sisterhood.
HIT saga returns with its fourth gripping chapter, introducing Karthi as ACP Veerappan.

t: MaatruBhumi: May War Rest in Peace
d: MaatruBhumi: May War Rest In Peace is a film based on the June 2020 clash between Indian and Chinese troops in the Galwan Valley, Ladakh. It chronicles the bravery, sacrifice, and resilience of the Indian soldiers during the high-altitude standoff, highlighting a gripping tale of courage and patriotism.

The extraordinary tale of Lucky Charlie, a mute boy who idolizes Charlie Chaplin, unfolds with a perfect blend of comedy and heartfelt moments. What begins as a journey of laughter soon turns into an unpredictable ride of fun and drama, delivering wholesome family entertainment till the end.
Inspired by one of the successful rescue missions of India from a war-torn country, Captain India leads an operation that displays exemplary bravery and courage.

One rare flower. A string of brutal murders. When a seasoned cop and a haunted psychology student race to uncover a deadly conspiracy within the police force, the mission spirals into a personal thirst for revenge. In this game, it isn't just murder, nor is it just another crime  it's a lesson in pain, forcing the guilty to remember the agony they tried to forget.
G2 (Goodachari 2) is a Telugu movie  starring Adivi Sesh in a prominent role. It is an action thriller directed by Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi.
David Reddy is a Telugu movie starring Manchu Manoj Kumar in a prominent role. It is directed by Hanuma Reddy Yakkanti.

Anbu, a taxi driver from Kannagi Nagar, grows close to Regina, a mute IT employee. When she is mysteriously murdered, he discovers several unrelated people are tied to her death. Rage follows his pursuit of the truth behind Reginas killing and the hidden motives that connect them all.

Chaitra needs to return to her hometown as PM has announced national lockdown. Raju, a bike mechanic and her friend, agrees to take her. Meanwhile a little girl is kidnapped. Will Chaitra reach home safely? Is the little girl safe? What is Raju hiding from Chaitra?
Kathanar - The Wild Sorcerer follows the legendary priest Kadamattathu Kathanar, who wielded mystical powers to confront dark forces in ancient Kadamattom.

Based on a true story, the film follows Amit, who grows up facing rejection and ridicule for being different. After being cast out by his family, he finds refuge in a transgender community and embraces his true identity as Amita. But just as he begins to rebuild his life, betrayal pushes him to the edge, until a chance encounter inspires him to reclaim his identity and find the strength to rise again.
Set against the chaotic backdrop of medieval India, lost to the pages of history, Bhairavana Kone Paata depicts Bhairava`s last lesson.

Tom, Dick and Harry Returns depicts a trio of friends wherein one is deaf, another is dumb, and the third is blind. This family entertainer directed by Deepak Tijori portrays the confusion and comedy that ensues through this friendship. The film features Aftab Shivdasani, Sharman Joshi, and Jimmy Sheirgill as Tom, Dick and Harry respectively.

A group of youngsters led by PK, the son of a political heavyweight are on a journey to their resort and the Karma returns in various forms through all the sins they have committed in the past. Will the Karma triumph over the tyranny? Will the Karma restore justice from  the clutches of power?
Billa Ranga Baasha is a Kannada movie starring Kiccha Sudeep in a prominent role. It is a drama directed by Anup Bhandari.

The immortal story of Rama and Ravana defined a culture and moved generations. It now arrives as a cinematic landmark of our time. Ramayana is a timeless saga reborn through the lens of modern Indian cinema.
Martial arts champion Tezeswar Sarkar falls for Priya Sen but she is in love with Rahul. Teza is willing to sacrifice everything in his path to marry Priya. How long can Rahul keep up?

Set in the village of Lanka, the story questions the illusion of freedom, revealing a land still scarred by violence and oppression. As faith is twisted into bloodshed and humanity descends into brutality, divine karma emerges as a guiding force, leading one soul back toward righteousness.

A scientist was doing research about the parallel universe. While testing it, the heavy power supply causes a blast which eventually leads to unimaginable consequences. Will the research be a success?
Pisasu 2 is a movie directed by Mysskin, starring Vijay Sethupathi, Andrea Jeremiah and Rajkumar Pitchumani in lead roles.
The bravest tale of a soldier from the hidden chapters of our history.

Howard Roark, a visionary architect, struggles to cope with the depressing reality of a world driven by conformism and battles to uphold his integrity and individualism at all costs against overwhelming odds.

A London-based girl dies after falling from a balcony during a wedding in Punjab. Her death is ruled suspicious, sparking a murder probe. With 20 suspects and buried secrets, the wedding turns into a deadly game of truth and lies.
Jai Hind is an Odia movie starring Aakash Dasnayak, Aankit Kumar, Anu Choudhury and Ananya Mishra in prominent roles. It is directed by Abhishek Tripathy.

Shivu, a village boy dreaming of becoming an actor, moves to Bangalore and works as an auto driver with his friend. He falls for Sneha, an aspiring actress, while Devu, a struggling filmmaker, casts them as leads in his first film, sparking conflict with the producer and putting their dreams to the test.

The Loop is a Telugu movie starring Silambarasan T. R. and Kalyani Priyadarshan in prominent roles. It is a drama political thriller directed by Venkat Prabhu with Yuvan Shankar Raja as musician, forming part of the crew.

If you are a representative of the production house, please share the details of the film with synopsis@bookmyshow.com
Prepare yourself for a vision beyond limits.

This action drama follows the life of an honest, straightforward cop who stands up for what is right. Starring Arvind Swamy as the no-nonsense cop, and Ritika Singh as his love interest, Selva's directorial venture also has Ganesh Venkatraman and prominent actress Simran playing important roles.
A policeman from the clues department tries to unravel murder mystery. When the investigation becomes more complex, it leads to a twisted path. Will he be able to unravel the chain of mystery?

Pari falls in love with Ayush, her classmate, but by the time she expresses her feelings, it is too late. When the two reunite years later, Ayush realises that Pari has changed and isn`t herself anymore.

1970s New York: determined to emerge from his powerful father`s shadow and make a name for himself in Manhattan real estate, aspiring mogul Donald J. Trump is in the earliest days of his career when he encounters the man who will become one of the most important figures in his life, political fixer Roy Cohn. Seeing promise in young Donald, the influential attorney - who secured espionage convictions against Julius and Ethel Rosenberg and investigated suspected Communists alongside Senator Joseph McCarthy - teaches his new acolyte how to amass wealth and power through deception, intimidation and media manipulation. The rest is history.
Tiger Vs Pathaan will be the 7th film in YRF Spy Universe, which follows the events of Pathaan, Tiger 3 and War 2.

The story revolves around Charlie, who while on a job search in Dubai meets Angel, the daughter of a millionaire, at various stages of his life there. Things get heady when Charlie dreams of her even after returning to India. He takes this as a sign and goes back to Dubai to try and woo her.
She is the chaos. He is the calm. Or is it the other way around?

In Kashipura, innocent Deva is pulled into the shadows of Guru Prasads mafia empire and Jaggis brutal killing spree. As his life spirals under their control, every choice drags him deeper into danger. Will Deva escape this darkness, or pay the ultimate price?
Screw Dheela is a Hindi movie starring Tiger Shroff and directed by Shashank Khaitan.
The gang is back! Catch Sachin, Reenu and friends in a new adventure filled with love, laughter and excitement.

Randamoozham is a retelling of the Mahabharata, from the perspective of Bhima, the second born of the Pandavas. It is based on M.T. Vasudevan Nair`s classic novel of the same name. The film features Mohanlal and Amitabh Bachchan in prominent roles. It is directed by Hariharan with A. R. Rahman as musician, forming part of the crew.
Set in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) and based on the Marvel Comics character of the same name.
Ram Rajya is an action drama directed by Sudhanshu Mohan Sahoo. The movie features Prem Parija in the lead role.
A few people get involved in a mysterious incident guide the plot through hilarious situations.
Myth and reality will blur, as past and present collide when an ancient legend meets this modern marvel!
A saga of courage, faith, and an adventure that transcends time! Haindava - A story rooted in divinity and fueled by adventure.
Manje Bistre 3 is a Punjabi movie starring Gippy Grewal in a prominent role.
Amarendra Baahubali`s death wasn`t his end, it was the beginning of something eternal.
After years of trying to win his mother`s endearment, Kunal learns that he is the bye-product of a gangrape. He then sets on a mission to punish the responsible savages.

Pellainde Kani No Kahani is a situational comedy centered on newlyweds Gopalakrishna and Radha, whose long-awaited first night keeps getting postponed due to a series of hilarious misunderstandings, family interruptions, and unexpected problems. Packed with quirky characters, witty dialogues, and humorous twists, the film follows whether Gopalakrishna will finally get the private moment he has been waiting for.
Adhira is a Telugu movie starring Kalyan Dasari and S.J. Suryah in prominent roles. It is directed by Sharan Koppisetty.

Violent Rose is a romantic thriller and action drama that follows Vaishnav Veera, a young man who battles dark forces to protect his beloved, Raadhvi Rose. The film explores love, sacrifice, and revenge where emotions become a source of power.

Teefa, an enforcer is on a mission to kidnap Anya, a girl that gangster Butt believes to be the best match for his son. However, he gets into trouble when Anya's gangster father and police chase after him.

Set in a town where cricket is more than just a game-it's life itself! Gana, a carefree youngster who loves fun over responsibility, crosses paths with the strong-willed Subhashini, whose ideals clash with his laid-back ways. Their journey, filled with humor, emotion, and surprises, takes unexpected turns as fate tests their courage and bond. What begins as playful rivalry soon leads to a story that could change many people's fate and lives forever.
Indira  -The Movie is a biopic on Indira Gandhi starring Vidya Balan in the titular role.

Tukaram, an archaeologist, accidentally connects on the phone with Madhura, an RJ whose identity is a mystery except her voice. Although initially they hate each other, in time they develop a love-hate relationship. Both of them are clueless as to how the other person looks, but they share a common interest- food and cooking. After several comical misadventures involving Tukaram, Madhura, two youngsters and fate, it all comes together at the end with some tadka.

Hari Singh Nalwa chronicles the life of the legendary Sikh warrior whose name struck fear across the Northwest frontier. As Maharaja Ranjit Singh`s most trusted general, Nalwa`s fearless campaigns extended from Punjab to the edges of Afghanistan. His legacy lives in folklore, where Afghan mothers warned their children with his name. This film brings to life the man who didn`t just fight battles, he carved his name into history with courage, strategy, and an unshakable spirit.
Shahu Chhatrapati is a Marathi movie directed by Varrun Sukhraj.
Jhaad Phoonk is a horror-drama directed by Rajan Ramgopal Verma. The movie features Padmini Kolhapure, Sumbul Touqeer, Yashpal Sharma, and Harsh Rajput in pivotal roles.
The story of Chiranjeevi Parashurama the eternal warrior of dharma!
Directed by Anees Bazmee, Aankhen 2 features Amitabh Bachchan, Arshad Warsi and Regina Cassandra in prominent roles.
Dayangaram is a vibrant youth-centric tale that blends humor with a powerful social message, exploring the dynamics between a carefree son and his principled father.

Jockey is an exciting and emotional journey that gallops through the world of horse racing, blending the thrill of the sport with deep human connections. The film beautifully weaves themes of animal love, heartfelt romance, family emotions, and intense drama into a captivating commercial entertainer. Get ready for a story where passion, emotion, and determination race side by side!

Khalifa is an action thriller revolving around a notorious gold smuggling kingpin who inherited his multi-million dollar criminal enterprise from a lineage of gangsters. The story follows his sprawling operation, which spans from the Middle East all the way to India.
Theenkirai is a Tamil movie starring Srikanth, Vetri and Smruthi Venkat in lead roles.
The film pays homage to the heroes of Purandar and salutes the supreme sacrifice of Veer Murarbaji Deshpande.

When a young woman's sister becomes trapped in a corrupt Bihar shelter home run by a ruthless owner and a powerful politician, she joins forces with a determined CBI officer to uncover the truth and rescue the girls imprisoned inside.
The Manseon House is a Telugu movie starring Suseel Meher, Yash and Vrinda Krishna in lead roles.

A video call between a group of media professionals takes a horrifying turn when a stranger infiltrates their session. The mysterious figure holds a dark secret that plunges them into a high-stakes game with deadly consequences. Can they escape the trap and survive?
Untitled Kartik Aaryan/Sreeleela Project Coming Soon.

A local town is terrified by a wave of sniper headshot murders, initially suggesting a serial killer. Private Detective Vijay Karthik discovers the killer is an unexpected person motivated by greed, targeting small business owners. The case becomes a deadly cat-and-mouse game, tragically complicated by the killer`s ex-boyfriend, which ultimately exposes her secret and costs several officers their lives.
Deep in the woods, a retired officer investigates an unresolved murder case at the JD Kere Estate, uncovering a truth that leaves him stupefied.

ADM Power and his younger brother share a bond so deep that one's pain becomes the other's wound. When deadly conspiracies rise to kill his brother, ADM makes a drastic choice: he leaves behind both his wives and devotes himself entirely to protecting him. What follows is the rise of a fierce guardian whose faith in Mahakal fuels his strength. This is not just a tale of two brothers; it is the story of unshakeable loyalty, sacrifice, and a man who becomes unstoppable when his brother's life is at stake.

A boy and a girl fall deeply in love, but a sudden betrayal tears them apart. When a turning point in the boys life leads him back to her, the girl refuses to accept him, leaving their love story unfinished.

Rahul, CEO of poison studio, is working on a photoshoot with three high profile models for an international commercial ad project. When they die suspiciously, Rahul is arrested for the crime. Who committed the murders? Will Rahul get out of this?

Inspired by Dr. B. R. Ambedkar's vision, the film follows Professor Jadhav, a progressive educator who believes education is the key to social transformation. As he challenges deep-rooted injustice and inequality, his journey becomes a call for equality, self-respect, and change.

An ex-special forces operative suffering from post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), who -- in his bid for redemption as a security guard, attempts to save the life of a woman who is being hunted by a corrupt police death squad working for a drug cartel.

An intriguing story of the life of Satyabhama, an orphan girl, who gets married to an aristocrat in her adolescence but finds herself in the clutches of horrendous Sati ritual on demise of her spouse. This is also a story of her brother Mahadev, who stands against the society opposing the sati ritual.
Tyson Naidu is a Telugu movie starring Bellamkonda Sai Srinivas and Nabha Natesh in prominent roles.
A story of courage, conscience, and compassion.
A romantic journey that began 15 years ago is about to unfold a new story...

During Covid-19 pandemic lockdown, four friends Deepa, Pooja and Nitya, join Spoorti`s birthday celebration via video call. After celebrating they plan to play seance but soon after starting, they start to experience weird things.
Garuda Chapter 1 is directed by Kranthi Bala; starring Satyadev in the lead.

The film dives deep into the intense world of North Chennai, focusing on fierce gang rivalries and power struggles. It promises compelling action and a dramatic story centred on themes of leadership and destiny.

When an old wardrobe begins to reveal a sinister presence, a series of unexplainable and terrifying events spirals out of control. As dark secrets resurface and reality turns into a nightmare, the battle against an unseen supernatural force becomes a fight for survival.

Bohurupi: The Golden Daku is the much-awaited sequel to the 2024 all-time blockbuster Bohurupi, where Bikram and Jhimli return, stepping into a thrilling new chapter of adventure and high-stakes drama.

Set between London and Gujarat, the breezy comedy Firki follows a young man whose seemingly harmless choice sets off a rollercoaster of unexpected events. What begins as a simple fix quickly unravels into chaos, emotion, and laughter, where nothing goes as planned. Firki is a journey of lies, love, and London life where every spin leads to fresh confusion and unforgettable comedy.
Family-wala is a family comedy directed by Suman Ghosh and marks his first collaboration with Windows Production House.
Welcome to the world of Vrushakarma, a mythical spectacle like never before.
Bombay Positive is a Malayalam romantic-comedy drama that tells the story of a pregnant woman with the rare blood group, Bombay Positive
A gangster turned messiah, Byrappa Nayaka uses rivalry and revenge to break the quest.
Kannanjaru  is a Kannada movie starring R. Balachandra, Apurva, Ramakrishna and K S Sridhar in prominent roles. It is directed by R. Balachandra.
Vikramaditya is a Telugu movie directed by Teja.
"Sardar 2" is a sequel to the 2022 Tamil movie "Sardar." Sardar 2 is directed by P.S. Mithran and features Karthi in the lead role.

A double murder from the night of a former chief minister`s death resurfaces after six years, reopening a case buried in chaos. As the investigation links it to a mysterious jewelry heist and missing CCTV footage, a darker truth emerges: evidence can be manipulated, and nothing is as it seems.
Dr. Robin, an NRI, arrives in India to set up a hospital on a property usurped by Durga. This feat leads him to a distant village, where he has to find the true meaning of life.
2 States is a Telugu movie starring Adivi Sesh in a prominent role.

A story by Piyush Jha, from the book Girls of Mumbaistan. A distraught schoolteacher is sucked into a disastrous maze of deceit to save her dying husband. There are twists and turns in unexpected places that will have you holding your breath and shocking twist-in-the-tale endings that will leave you wanting more.

In a small market town, a peaceful family's life is shattered by three unruly youths. Though punished by the court, they refuse to change and commit another crime, only to face revenge from the very girl they tried to destroy.

A one-night story set inside a bachelor house where harmless fun slowly turns eerie as strange, supernatural events unfold. What starts with laughter turns into paranoia, blending humour and horror while keeping the audience tense, curious, and guessing till the end.
The son who tries to kill his father. The father who fights to protect his son. The story of every father and son.
Salman Khan featuring in and as The Bull.
The biography of a wounded man.
BTSs most dazzling moments come to life once again on screen. Relive the concerts that have shaped BTSs journey, now beautifully remastered for cinemas!

A romantic drama that explores the tenderness and intensity of young first love. It captures the emotional journey of two youngsters as they experience love for the very first time, along with the challenges that come with it.

Once upon a time, magical creatures called jinns and shaithans lived in the human realm, blending in among people. Masood Khan becomes trapped in their world, and his fight to survive against all odds takes him on an emotional roller coaster that everyone must experience.

In a remote and beautiful stretch of the Western Odisha Reserve Forest, the emerald canopy and rich wildlife have long been targeted by timber mafias, poachers, and land sharks. Stepping into this battle is Laddo, a man who chooses the trees as his only family, becoming the unyielding guardian of the green.
Its a period movie based on the true life event of the Maharaja of Jamnagar who saved 1000 polish kids during the world war II.

Street Life tells the story of Chennamma, a rag picker living in a roadside hut with her husband, Muniya, and their five-year-old son, Babu. With Babu born deaf and mute and her husband's struggles with alcohol and petty theft, Chennamma takes on the immense burden of the family. Determined to help her son, she works tirelessly to afford his schooling and medical expenses. The film follows a mother's relentless quest to give her son a voice and the ability to hear, no matter the cost.

For the first time, the timeless story of Hanuman is brought to the big screen in a groundbreaking "Made-in-AI," "Made-in-India" cinematic experience. Chiranjeevi Hanuman: The Eternal is an innovative spectacle created with deep reverence for Indian culture, heritage, and history.
John, a New York-based undercover agent, and his team is entrusted with a secret mission to bring back the leader of the team, Mr. K. John, who has gone missing mysteriously.

A seemingly perfect couple's life takes an unsettling turn when an unexpected presence enters their world. What begins as admiration slowly spirals into emotional chaos, blurring the lines between love, attachment, and obsession. As fear and tension grow, their lives descend into a disturbing psychological conflict.
A man`s reunion with an old friend in London plunges him into a terrifying mystery involving dark secrets, eerie occurrences, and a chilling obsession with life and death.
In a land ruled by a ruthless tyrant, a young man embarks on a dangerous quest to dismantle the warlords empire and free his people from oppression.
Polimera 3 is a pan India horror thriller film delves into a gripping tale of suspense and fear.
Korean Kanakaraju is an upcoming Indo-Korean horror comedy film starring Varun Tej, Ritika Nayak, Satya, and others. Written and directed by Merlapaka Gandhi, with music by Thaman S.

Amid rising geopolitical tensions and a web of espionage, a conflicted patriot, along with his reluctant friend, must navigate betrayal, deception, and their personal redemption to protect the country from a devastating conspiracy.
Directed by Ram, the film features Nivin Pauly, Anjali, and Soori in prominent roles.
Some stories choose you at the right moment in life.
Based on the real battle between the British East India Company and the Peshwa faction of the Maratha Confederacy, this historical drama portrays Arjun Rampal as a Mahar warrior involved in the war.
Karachi 81 is based on the story of India`s finest insurgency commando.

Based on the short story written in 1942 by Indian female Urdu writer Ismat Chugtai, Lihaaf is a narrative of a true event that happened in Ismat's life when she was in her teens. Living in a feudal family, Ismat witnessed an emotional and physical relationship between Begum, who is often neglected by her husband, and her lady masseur. Lihaaf goes ahead and sheds light on how the behaviour of rich land-owning men, who are often lost in their pursuit of male-centric pleasures, resulted in the women seeking joys in the female company out of sheer neglect.
Ishq Ne Ghalib Nikamma kar diya Varna Aadmi Hum Bhi theey kam ke.
Alcohol is a Telugu feature film directed by Meher Tej. The movie features Allari Naresh, Ruhani Sharma, Niharika NM, Satya, and others.

Lankasura takes us into the decorated yet vicious world of gangsters through the eyes of Raghava, a gangster himself. How did he get to be known as a demon? Can he manage his relationships amidst his crookedly violent life?
A new era begins with Ranveer Singh as Don!
A vow from the Tretayuga, bound to be fulfilled in the Kaliyuga.
When a multimillionaire Ramanadhan is murdered, the suspicion points towards his son, Siva, who must prove his innocence.
Golmaal five is a Hindi movie starring Ajay Devgn in a prominent role. It is a drama directed by Rohit Shetty.
Sheran Di Kaum Punjabi is a Punjabi movie directed by Gippy Grewal.
Based on a forgotten chapter in Indian history, `The India House` is a film set in London during the pre-independence era.
Based on the novel of the same name by Humayun Ahmed, the film follows the iconic fictional psychologist Misir Ali on his quest to solve a mystery surrounding a woman named Ranu.

t: The Last Voyage of the Demeter
d: Based on a single chilling chapter from Bram Stokers classic novel Dracula, The Last Voyage of the Demeter tells the terrifying story of the merchant ship Demeter, which was chartered to carry private cargofifty unmarked wooden cratesfrom Carpathia to London.

Sathyam visits Malenadu  to meet Geetha and witness butharadhanay. The spectacular  journey opens about the mysterious blemish concocted story of the Royal Family, leading to facts, puzzling twists and the royal family disclosing the hidden truth.

In 1900 AD, a series of terrible events unfolded in the small village of Hanumagiri. Known for its strange rituals and mysterious secrets, the village's dark past remained hidden for centuries. The story follows the modern-day Archaeology Department as they uncover these long-buried secrets, revealing the eerie and chilling history of Hanumagiri.

The story follows a butcher's daughter on a fierce path of revenge, driven by loss and loyalty. Her journey is raw and violent, unfolding against a backdrop of romance, conflict, and an unyielding fight for justice.
Ilaiyaraaja is a movie starring Dhanush in the titular role.
The film is an adaptation of the book `The Untold Vajpayee: Politician and Paradox` by renowned author Ullekh NP.
The movie is based on the life of Chanakya, who was a sharp-witted person, a royal adviser, and an economist.

Sanjana, a grieving woman struggling with childlessness, encounters a stranger who drugs her with a paralytic agent. Trapped in her own body as it slowly shuts down, she must battle fear, pain, and despair to survive, turning her emotional paralysis into a desperate fight for life against a cold, methodical killer.
Mafia is a Kannada movie starring Prajwal Devaraj, Aditi Prabhudeva and Devaraj in prominent roles. It is directed by Lohith H.
Mahaparinirvan is a Marathi movie starring Prasad Oak and Anjali Patil in prominent roles
Rosie is a Hindi movie starring Arbaaz Khan and Palak Tiwari in prominent roles. It is directed by Ranjan Mishra.

A common man becomes Chief Minister without ever contesting an election. He knows the people's problems because he is one of them. But powerful enemies and dangerous conspiracies stand between him and change.
Can one ordinary man survive a ruthless political system and transform it?
Sheene is a biopic based on the life of British motorcycle legend Barry Sheene, based on the book "Barry: The story of motorcycling legend Barry Sheene" written by Steve Parrish and Nick Harris.
Apne 2 is a drama film directed by Anil Sharma, featuring Sunny Deol and Dharmendra in prominent roles.

Amid the vibrant Ujjani Chowdeshwari Devi Festival, a story of love, humor, and mystery unfolds as diverse lives collide in unexpected ways. As secrets come to light and destinies intertwine, the journey blends emotion, suspense, and devotion against the backdrop of a spirited celebration.
In a dense magical forest facing a crisis, old rivalries appear and destiny calls. As the fight for control of the forest intensifies, a savior emerges to lead the way!
With over 16000 Indian lives at stake in Ukraine, India defied all logistics and launched an operation to bring them home.
Benz is a Tamil movie directed by Bakkiyaraj Kannan. The movie features Raghava Lawrence and Nivin Pauly in the pivotal roles.

Arjun is a Crime Branch Police Officer who handles extra-marital affair cases. Arjun considers the profession as divine until he catches his wife Navya with her boyfriend Sandy in his house. What will Arjun do?

In the picturesque village of Dapoli, the lives of four strangers Ram, Mahesh, Suraj, and Preeti intertwine over shared struggles and loss. Bonded by longing, they devise a daring, genius plan to turn their fortunes around. However, their perfect crime unwittingly disturbs the restless slumber of a long-forgotten ghost who has planned his perfect comeback. What follows is a riotous comedy of errors and a spooky showdown where greed, guilt, and the supernatural collide in chaotic delight.

Two ill-fated men, desperate to make money, kidnaps a wealthy woman`s dog and demands a hefty ransom. The plan goes down the drain when they get entangled with the wedding of a business tycoon. Will they make the money?

On the timeless ghats of Varanasi, a chance encounter draws two strangers into a day of quiet conversations, shared walks, and simple meals by the river. What begins as a coincidence gradually evolves into an unspoken connection, lingering long after the day is over.
Achaludu is a Telugu movie directed by Bala, starring Suriya Sivakumar and Krithi Shetty in lead roles.
While Jonaki, an 80-year-old woman, searches for love in a strange world of decaying memories, her lover, now old and grey, returns to a world she is leaving behind.
Mere Raho is a Hindi movie starring Sai Pallavi and Junaid Khan in prominent roles. It is directed by Nelson Venkatesan.

Madhuramee Jeevitham is a poignant family drama that explores aging, relationships, and the quiet beauty of everyday life. The story follows Chanthu Menon, a retired bank manager adjusting to a slower phase of life alongside his wife. The film offers a heartfelt, performance-driven experience that resonates across generations.

In 1991, a group of refugees was wrongfully imprisoned in Vellore Fort, accused of involvement in a high-profile assassination. Despite being proven innocent, many remained incarcerated until 1995, when 43 of them staged a daring escape; some were recaptured, while others fled abroad in search of freedom.
Cute kids studying in school find a baby by accident and take care of it without the knowledge of their parents. When the parents find out, they start looking for the child's parents
Naa Peru Shiva 2 is a drama film directed by Pa. Ranjith, featuring Karthi in a prominent roles.

After the wedding of the king of Bombagarh, Raja Hobuchandra, with the princess of Sapnapur, Devi Kusumkali, a stranger named Gobuchandra arrives in the kingdom. He tricks his way to becoming the king`s new Minister, replacing the old and wise Mantri. When a Saint and his disciple enter the kingdom, they realise what is going on and join hands with the old Mantri to save Bombagarh from doom.
Taboo is a Marathi movie directed by Pushkar Jog. It features Pushkar and Hemal Ingle in the lead role.
Carry On Jattiye is a Punjabi movie starring Sargun Mehta, Jasmin Bhasin and Sunil Grover in prominent roles.

Omlo explores the deep bond between a 7-year-old boy and a camel, reflecting the stark contrast in how people treat animals versus their own family. Set against a backdrop of generational trauma, the story reveals a household trapped in cycles of abuse, fear, and patriarchy. As Omlo relives the fears once faced by his father, the narrative questions whether these patterns are destined to repeat or if theres hope for change through the love and resilience of his mother.

t: Richard Anthony: Lord of the Sea
d: A period drama written and directed by Rakshit Shetty.

Set across a vibrant college campus and a chaotic hostel, three carefree seniors spend their days chasing fun, friendship, and mischief. But after a confrontation with the chairmans son, their easygoing lives spiral into a chain of strange and unexpected events. Blending comedy with suspense, 3Moorthilu takes a surprising turn where hostel madness hides a mystery no one sees coming.

t: Toxic: A Fairy Tale for Grown-ups
d:
Set in Goa between the early 1940s and the 1970s, Toxic is a savage action-thriller saga that plunges into the rot festering beneath paradise. In this coastal land of fading colonial shadows and rising crime syndicates, a man forges his empire through blood, fear, and betrayal. Power is not granted-it is seized, and it always demands repayment. As smuggling routes become battlegrounds and loyalties unravel into suspicion, paranoia turns into a means of survival. In the end, the only force more powerful than the consequences of his choices is the abyss within him.

Directed by Geetu Mohandas and written by Yash and Geetu Mohandas, Toxic features a powerhouse ensemble cast including Yash, Nayanthara, Kiara Advani, Huma Qureshi, Rukmini Vasanth, and Tara Sutaria in pivotal roles.

The Millet Diary is a heartfelt social drama that blends history, love, health, and rural empowerment. Inspired by ancient healing traditions of Kalinga, the story traces the forgotten medicinal value of millet, a crop capable of transforming lives.

Alongside this emotional journey, the film also highlights the importance of millet cultivation in tribal regions and how government schemes are helping tribal communities become economically stronger through sustainable farming. Rooted in Odia culture and social awareness, The Millet Diary is a powerful reminder that small changes in food habits can lead to healthier lives and a better future.

For twenty years, a brutal murder has occurred every Amavasya night in Bowda village, and neither the police nor the CBI can solve the mystery. Fear and superstition grip the villagers, who believe a dark curse haunts them. A famous retina photographer, Vibho, arrives in the village and discovers strange reflections hidden in the victims' retina photographs.

With the help of his longtime love Dhatri, a forensic expert, he uncovers that the killer has been hiding in plain sight using darkness and illusion. On the next Amavasya, they expose and capture the culprit, ending the terror and uniting in love.

It's job-hunting season and six high-achieving university students make it to the final round of recruitment for the elite tech company, Spirallinks. For the last task, rivals become teammates as they create a study circle to prepare for a group discussion, which will determine their career's fate.

However, an unexpected twist threatens the alliances formed, as a game of deceit and manipulation unfolds. Based on Akinari Asakura's wildly popular novel of the same name, Six Lying University Students delivers a high-suspense drama where a simple job interview becomes a psychological battleground.

While on a hunt, a king falls in love with a forest beauty and marries her. But certain courtiers in the palace grow unhappy with this union and turn him against her - setting off a chain of unfortunate events that leads to the downfall of both king and kingdom.

Centuries later, reborn into a privileged life, the queen's furious soul returns seeking revenge. Yet when faced with the sincere remorse of a misguided but kind-hearted king, she is torn between mercy and vengeance.

The climax unfolds a beautiful, heartfelt message - one of peace, prosperity, and the grace of making the world a better place to live in.

t: Keu Bole Biplobi Keu Bole Dakat
d:
A string of daring robberies shocks 1960s Kolkata, all linked to a mysterious man called Ananta. Once a freedom fighter in the ranks of Master-da Surya Sen, he now wages his own war against corruption.

A revolutionary turned dacoit, but why? As police chase him through the city, the story, inspired by real events, reveals the painful cost of a revolution that failed most of its heroes.
